briefdescription.para: This function initializes the I2S Transmitter.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the I2S Transmitter includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the I2s Transmitter.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the I2s Transmitter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the I2s Transmitter.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the specified interrupt of the I2s Transmitter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
is a bit mask of the interrupts to be enabled.

simplesect.para: XI2stx_hw.h for the available interrupt masks.

briefdescription.para: Disables interrupts for the I2S Transmitter instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables one or more interrupts for the specified I2S Transmitter instance based on the provided interrupt mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XI2s_Tx instance to be worked on.
A bitmask specifying which interrupts to disable. Each bit in the mask corresponds to a specific interrupt source.

simplesect.para: The caller is responsible for ensuring that InstancePtr is a valid pointer to an initialized XI2s_Tx instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the input source for the specified I2s channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
specifies the I2s channel
specifies the input source

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE : if the I2s channel is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the SCLK Output divider value of the I2S timing generator.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
is the frequency of the MClk.

is the sampling frequency of the system. Divider value for the SCLK generation, MCLK/SCLK = SCLKOUT_DIV x 2 i.e. MCLK = 384xFs, SCLK = 48xFs (2x24bits) -> SCLKOUT_DIV = MCLK/SCLK/2 = 4 Valid values are 1 through 15.

simplesect.para:
- XST_FAILURE if SCLK Output divider is not calculated to be a positive integer.
XST_SUCCESS, otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the captured AES Channel Status bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the I2s Transmitter instance.
is a pointer to a buffer that is used for writing the AES Channel Status bits, this needs to be allocated by user application

briefdescription.para: This function clears the captured AES Channel Status bits.

detaileddescription.para: This will clear all the 6 channel status registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s_Tx core instance.
is a pointer to the XI2s Transmitter instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the justification.

briefdescription.para: This function is to enable right/left justification.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI2s Transmitter instance.

is a enum to select the left or right justification.
XI2S_TX_JUSTIFY_LEFT : Left justification
XI2S_TX_JUSTIFY_RIGHT : Right justification
